summary: Completed frontend testing of My Car Garage PWA. DELETE car functionality WORKS correctly. Car images not loading correctly due to Unsplash source.unsplash.com service returning 503 errors - fallback to default images is working but all cars show the same generic car image.

minor.issue: Returns source.unsplash.com URLs which are returning 503 errors - service appears to be down/deprecated

integration_issues.issue: All cars show the same default image (blue BMW-style car) because Unsplash source URLs fail with 503 errors. The fallback works but doesn't match the user's brand/model

passed_tests: User registration flow - creates user and redirects to dashboard
User login flow (implicit - token stored in localStorage)
Add new car form - brand/model selection working
Car creation - Skoda Superb saved successfully
Car creation - BMW M3 saved successfully
DELETE CAR FUNCTIONALITY - WORKING - Critical bug FIXED
Car removed from dashboard after deletion
Dashboard shows 0 vehicles after all cars deleted
action_items: MEDIUM: Replace source.unsplash.com with alternative image service (Pexels API, Pixabay API, or pre-downloaded car images) since Unsplash source is returning 503 errors
LOW: Consider adding data-testid attributes to key buttons for better test automation
critical_code_review_comments: CarFormPage.js uses CAR_IMAGES fallback when dynamic image fails - this is working correctly as a safety net
The carsApi.getImage() returns source.unsplash.com URLs that are failing (503) - this external service dependency is a reliability concern
Delete functionality in CarDetailPage.js and api.js is now working correctly with proper Authorization header
test_credentials: Multiple test users created: test_1771592075@example.com, test_1771592206@example.com (password: TestPassword123)
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data - all test cars were deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: DELETE car functionality is confirmed working. Image loading issue is due to external Unsplash service returning 503 errors. The fallback to default images works but shows generic car image regardless of brand/model. If image-specific testing is needed, the source.unsplash.com service dependency should be replaced.

delete_button_issue.root_cause: Previously the delete API call was missing Authorization header. This was fixed by E1 agent before this test run.
delete_button_issue.verification: DELETE /api/cars/{id} returns 200 with proper auth header

image_loading_issue.root_cause: The source.unsplash.com dynamic image service is returning 503 Service Unavailable errors
image_loading_issue.impact: All cars show the same default fallback image instead of brand-specific images
image_loading_issue.mitigation: Replace with alternative image API or pre-download car images
